sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Lazio are in strong form, unbeaten in their last 7 matches with 3 wins and 4 draws in their last 5 games, scoring consistently. Lecce, on the other hand, have struggled, managing only 1 win and 2 draws in their last 5 matches, with a poor defensive record.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last two head-to-head encounters, Lazio have won both matches (1-0 at home and 2-1 away). Historically, matches between these teams often see both teams scoring and over 2.5 goals, with Lazio usually taking the lead.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Lazio, sitting 6th with 65 points, have a potent attack (61 goals, 3rd in the league) but concede frequently (48 goals). Lecce, in 17th with 31 points, have struggled offensively (26 goals) and defensively (58 goals conceded), showing a clear gap in quality.

sections.subtitle: Key Players and Injuries
sections.text: Lazio’s Pedro is in excellent form with 4 goals in the last 5 matches, while Lecce miss key attacking options like Tete Morente. Lazio also have some defensive absences but maintain depth in attack.

sections.subtitle: Match Context
sections.text: Played at Stadio Olimpico, Lazio are favored due to home advantage and superior form. Lecce’s defensive vulnerabilities and poor away form suggest they will struggle to contain Lazio’s attack.
